allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'installed <- installed.packages\(\)[,"Package"]; needed <- c\("flexdashboard","rmarkdown","plotly","DT","thematic","bslib","shiny","dplyr","tidyr","ggplot2","corrplot","treemap","cluster","factoextra","scales","RColorBrewer","ggridges","GGally","reshape2"\); cat\("Installed:", paste\(needed[needed %in% installed], collapse=", "\), "\\n"\); cat\("Missing:", paste\(needed[!needed %in% installed], collapse=", "\), "\\n"\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'needed <- c\("flexdashboard","DT","thematic","shiny","corrplot","treemap","factoextra","ggridges","GGally","reshape2"\); installed <- installed.packages\(\)[,"Package"]; cat\("Missing:", paste\(needed[!needed %in% installed], collapse=", "\), "\\n"\)')
